function: Signal of coherence, vitality, or unexpected alignment between self and environment
authentic_output: Vitality, creative flow, openness, reinforced learning

response_protocol.detect: Has alignment occurred between self-intent and world-state?
response_protocol.assess: Is the vitality internally resonant or externally performative?
response_protocol.respond: Savor, integrate, and use as orientation marker
response_protocol.steward: Avoid exploiting or clinging to transient states
